About Me

Building Websites That Work Hard

I'm Syed Muhammad Hammad Tariq — a WordPress & CMS Specialist based in Lahore, Pakistan, with over 5 years of experience designing, building, and managing websites for clients across UAE, USA, UK, and Pakistan.

My workflow goes beyond standard WordPress development. I combine CMS expertise with modern AI tools — Lovable, Google Stitch, Claude, ChatGPT, and Cursor — to design custom UIs, implement features faster, and deliver results that would normally take much longer to build.

I've worked across agency and freelance environments, managing multiple websites simultaneously while handling everything from CRM integrations and custom plugin development to security hardening and technical SEO.

📍 Lahore, Pakistan 🌐 Remote Worldwide 🎓 BSCS — Lahore Leads University 🗣️ English & Urdu

Case Studies

Projects in Depth

A closer look at the challenges, approach, and outcomes behind selected projects.

01
EdTech Platform for UK Market

Theory Test Master

Full project breakdown
The Challenge
The client needed a complete online driving theory test preparation platform targeting UK learners — with practice tests, progress tracking, and a mobile-first learning experience.
The Solution
Built on WordPress with custom plugin integration for the test engine. Designed a clean, distraction-free UI optimized for mobile. Implemented user dashboard, progress tracking, and performance-optimized page loads for fast test-taking.
The Result
A clean, fast, mobile-first EdTech platform fully functional in the UK market with strong PageSpeed scores and intuitive UX that keeps learners engaged.
WordPressCustom PluginsMobile-FirstUK MarketPerformance Optimization
View Live Site →
02
AI-Powered UI Workflow

EBS Digital Agency

Full project breakdown
The Challenge
The client needed a professional digital agency website that looked fully custom — not templated — but needed to be delivered fast without a full custom build from scratch.
The Solution
Used Lovable and Google Stitch to design custom UI mockups, then converted the generated HTML/CSS/JS into Elementor JSON templates imported directly into WordPress. Used Elementor Agentic AI to convert sections into reusable widgets and enhanced interactions with custom JavaScript.
The Result
A fully custom-looking website delivered significantly faster than traditional development — a showcase of the modern AI-powered workflow that makes this approach unique.
LovableGoogle StitchElementor AIAI WorkflowWordPress
View Live Site →
03
Security-First Professional Website

Facts Investigation

Full project breakdown
The Challenge
An investigation services company needed a professional website that inspired trust — with airtight security, secure contact forms, and strong SEO to attract high-value clients.
The Solution
Developed on WordPress with full technical SEO, structured data and on-page optimization. Implemented comprehensive security: Wordfence, Google reCAPTCHA v3, Honeypot, WPS Hide Login, Cloudflare and daily backups. All contact forms securely routed.
The Result
A trustworthy, high-performing website with a strong security posture and improved search visibility — exactly what a sensitive service business needs.
WordPressWordfenceCloudflareTechnical SEOreCAPTCHA v3
View Live Site →
04
Wix eCommerce Online Store

Cakes by Teweka

Full project breakdown
The Challenge
A custom cake business needed an attractive online store where customers could browse cake designs, place custom orders with specifications, and checkout easily on mobile — without complex backend management for the owner.
The Solution
Built on Wix using its eCommerce capabilities with a visually rich product gallery tailored for cake presentation. Designed a clean, mobile-first layout with custom ordering flow, product categories and an easy-to-manage store backend so the owner could update products independently without technical help.
The Result
A beautiful, fully functional online cake store on Wix that handles orders end-to-end. The owner manages products independently, and the mobile-first checkout delivers a smooth customer experience that drives conversions.
WixeCommerceOnline StoreCustom DesignMobile-First
View Live Site →
05
Shopify Pet Products Store

PetsQtr

Full project breakdown
The Challenge
A pet products retailer needed a high-performance eCommerce store that could handle a large product catalog across multiple pet categories — dogs, cats, birds, fish and more — with a reliable local payment solution for their market.
The Solution
Built on Shopify using the premium Impulse theme for its performance and visual flexibility. Integrated the Fawran payment gateway to enable seamless local payment processing. Applied custom code enhancements to improve the product browsing experience, category navigation and mobile performance beyond what the theme offered out of the box.
The Result
A fast, professional Shopify store with smooth category browsing, reliable local payment processing via Fawran, and a polished mobile experience — delivering a full-featured pet retail platform ready to scale.
ShopifyImpulse ThemeFawran PaymentCustom CodeMobile-First
View Live Site →
06
Beauty Services & Online Booking

Radwa Fateen Home Salon

Full project breakdown
The Challenge
A home salon business needed a professional website that showcased their beauty services elegantly, allowed clients to book appointments online, and accepted payments digitally — all in a mobile-first design that reflected the brand's premium feel.
The Solution
Built on WordPress with Elementor for a fully custom, elegant visual design. Integrated WooCommerce to handle service bookings and online payments. Connected the Network payment gateway to enable secure, local digital payment acceptance. Designed the full layout with a beauty-first aesthetic — soft colors, clean typography and prominent service showcasing.
The Result
A premium, mobile-first home salon website that handles end-to-end bookings and payments online. The client now receives digital bookings and payments automatically, reducing manual coordination and presenting a professional brand image to customers.
WordPressElementorWooCommerceNetwork Payment GatewayMobile-First
View Live Site →
Services

How I Can Help

End-to-end web solutions from new builds to maintenance, security and digital marketing.

🏗️
WordPress Development
Custom WordPress websites built with Elementor, ACF, and WooCommerce. From corporate sites to eCommerce stores — fast, mobile-first, and SEO-ready.
🤖
AI-Powered Customization
I use Lovable, Google Stitch, Claude, ChatGPT, and Cursor to design custom UIs and implement features efficiently — more value in less time.
🔒
Security & Recovery
Hacked website? I recover and restore it, then set up Wordfence, Cloudflare, reCAPTCHA v3, and daily automated backups.
⚡
Speed Optimization
I optimize using GTmetrix, PageSpeed Insights, WP Rocket, and Nitropack for fast scores and better user experience.
🔗
CRM Integration
Connect your website to Zoho CRM or GoHighLevel so every lead is automatically captured, tracked, and managed.
📈
SEO & Digital Marketing
Technical and on-page SEO, Facebook Meta Ad campaigns, AI-assisted content creation and Canva graphic design for your brand.
